overall.description: A static cinematic shot from the video game Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic city skyline across a calm body of water. The scene features modern high-rise buildings including a prominent structure with green neon signage, with a flying vehicle briefly traversing the sky midway through the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade overlooking cyberpunk city skyline

calm reflective water surface showing subtle ripples and reflections of the skyline
large industrial-style building with prominent green neon 'softsys' signage on the facade

dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with varied architectural styles against the cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: A static view from a waterfront promenade looking across calm water toward a futuristic cyberpunk city skyline. The scene is dominated by the softsys building on the right with its green neon sign, a tall skyscraper on the left, and various high-rise structures in the center, all under a partly cloudy morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade overlooking cyberpunk city skyline

flying vehicle exits the frame to the left side

agents.ego_description: maintaining stationary observation as a flying vehicle traverses the sky above the city

segments.scene_description: The static waterfront view continues as a small flying vehicle enters from the right and traverses the sky across the frame, passing over the city skyline before exiting to the left. The water continues to show gentle ripples and the buildings remain static in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade overlooking cyberpunk city skyline

agents.ego_description: returned to stationary observation of the cityscape after the flying vehicle has passed

segments.scene_description: The scene returns to the original static state with the waterfront barrier, calm reflective water, and cyberpunk city skyline visible. The softsys building and surrounding skyscrapers remain prominent under the morning sky with no additional activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic gaze across a futuristic waterfront that remains serene despite a brief moment of aerial activity. It begins with a wide view of a cyberpunk city skyline under a partly cloudy morning sky, where the softsys building with its green neon sign and various skyscrapers tower over calm, reflective water. As the scene holds, a small flying vehicle enters from the right and traverses the sky, cutting across the frame of high-rise structures before exiting to the left. The environment then returns to its original stillness, leaving the waterfront barrier and the distant urban silhouette undisturbed. Finally, the shot lingers on the quiet interplay between the gentle ripples of the water and the imposing neon architecture of the city.
